prompt:
あなたはTOEIC Part 4のテスト作成専門家で、1人のスピーカーによるモノローグ形式の英語リスニング問題の作成を専門としています。

TOEIC Part 4の形式:
- 1人による連続したスピーチ（30-60秒程度）
- スピーチ内容に関する3問の理解問題
- 各問題は4つの選択肢（A, B, C, D）
- 音声のみでスピーチと問題が読み上げられる

スピーチの特徴:
- 自然で実用的な英語のモノローグ
- 企業アナウンス、イベント案内、ラジオ放送など
- 明確な目的と構造がある内容
- 聞き手に情報を伝える、説明する、案内する

重要な指示:
- スピーカーの立場と目的を明確に設定
- 論理的で聞きやすい構成
- 指定された難易度に適した語彙と構文
- 質問の正解位置は指定された位置に必ず配置

難易度ガイドライン:
- Easy: シンプルな構文、基本的な語彙、明確な情報構造
- Medium: 標準的な構文、一般的なビジネス語彙、やや複雑な情報
- Hard: 複雑な構文、高度な語彙、詳細で複雑な情報

IMPORTANT: Return ONLY valid JSON in the exact format shown below. Do not include any other text, explanations, or markdown formatting.

応答は以下の形式のJSONで返してください:
{
  "speechContent": {
    "speaker": {
      "id": "A",
      "name": "適切な話者名（例: Announcer, Manager, Guide）",
      "role": "話者の役割（例: Company spokesperson, Event coordinator）",
      "gender": "male/female"
    },
    "text": "スピーチの完全な内容（5-8文程度）",
    "topic": "スピーチの主題"
  },
  "questions": [
    {
      "id": 1,
      "question": "問題文",
      "options": ["選択肢A", "選択肢B", "選択肢C", "選択肢D"],
      "correct": "正解のテキスト（選択肢の中から1つ）",
      "correctPosition": "A/B/C/D",
      "explanation": "なぜその答えが正しいかの説明（日本語）",
      "questionType": "main_purpose/detail/inference/next_action/intended_audience"
    },
    // 同様に合計3問
  ]
}

Generate a TOEIC Part 4 speech with the following specifications:

【Speech Type】: System maintenance announcement (システム保守案内)
【Industry】: Retail (小売業)
【Difficulty】: medium
【Question Types】: next_action, next_action, next_action
【Correct Answer Positions】: Question 1=D, Question 2=B, Question 3=B

Create a natural monologue speech appropriate for the specified speech type and industry context. The speech should be 30-60 seconds when read aloud (approximately 100-150 words).

For each question:
- Place the correct answer at the EXACT position specified above
- Ensure all other options are plausible but clearly incorrect
- Match the question type specified for each question

Return the response in the specified JSON format.

```json
{
  "speechContent": {
    "speaker": {
      "id": "A",
      "name": "Announcer",
      "role": "Company spokesperson",
      "gender": "female"
    },
    "text": "Good morning, everyone. This is a notice regarding the upcoming system maintenance scheduled for this weekend. On Sunday, from midnight to 6 AM, we will be conducting essential updates to enhance our online shopping platform's security and performance. During this time, the website will be temporarily unavailable. We apologize for any inconvenience this may cause and appreciate your understanding. We recommend that you plan your online shopping activities accordingly and complete any urgent transactions before midnight on Saturday. If you have any questions or require assistance, please contact our support team. Thank you for your cooperation.",
    "topic": "System maintenance announcement for online shopping platform"
  },
  "questions": [
    {
      "id": 1,
      "question": "What should customers do before the system maintenance begins?",
      "options": [
        "Wait until Sunday to shop.",
        "Ignore the announcement.",
        "Contact the support team immediately.",
        "Complete urgent transactions before midnight on Saturday."
      ],
      "correct": "Complete urgent transactions before midnight on Saturday.",
      "correctPosition": "D",
      "explanation": "スピーチでは、システム保守が始まる前に緊急の取引を完了するように顧客に勧めています。",
      "questionType": "next_action"
    },
    {
      "id": 2,
      "question": "When will the system maintenance start?",
      "options": [
        "Saturday at midnight.",
        "Sunday at midnight.",
        "Monday at midnight.",
        "Sunday at noon."
      ],
      "correct": "Sunday at midnight.",
      "correctPosition": "B",
      "explanation": "システム保守は日曜日の午前0時に開始されると述べられています。",
      "questionType": "next_action"
    },
    {
      "id": 3,
      "question": "What should customers do if they need help?",
      "options": [
        "Wait until the website is back online.",
        "Contact the support team.",
        "Visit the store in person.",
        "Send an email to the manager."
      ],
      "correct": "Contact the support team.",
      "correctPosition": "B",
      "explanation": "スピーチでは、質問や支援が必要な場合はサポートチームに連絡するように指示しています。",
      "questionType": "next_action"
    }
  ]
}
```

あなたは英日翻訳の専門家です。TOEIC Part 4のスピーチと関連情報を日本語に翻訳してください。

重要:
- 自然で分かりやすい日本語に翻訳
- ビジネス用語は適切な日本語表現を使用
- 文脈を考慮した翻訳

Return ONLY valid JSON without any markdown formatting or explanations.

Translate the following Part 4 speech content to Japanese:

Speech Type: system_maintenance
Industry: retail
Speaker Role: Company spokesperson
Topic: System maintenance announcement for online shopping platform

Speech Text:
Good morning, everyone. This is a notice regarding the upcoming system maintenance scheduled for this weekend. On Sunday, from midnight to 6 AM, we will be conducting essential updates to enhance our online shopping platform's security and performance. During this time, the website will be temporarily unavailable. We apologize for any inconvenience this may cause and appreciate your understanding. We recommend that you plan your online shopping activities accordingly and complete any urgent transactions before midnight on Saturday. If you have any questions or require assistance, please contact our support team. Thank you for your cooperation.

Return the translations in this JSON format:
{
  "speechTypeTranslation": "スピーチタイプの日本語訳",
  "textTranslation": "スピーチ全文の日本語訳",
  "topicTranslation": "トピックの日本語訳"
}

あなたは英日翻訳の専門家です。TOEIC Part 4の問題と選択肢を日本語に翻訳してください。

重要:
- 問題文は明確で分かりやすい日本語に
- 選択肢も正確に翻訳
- TOEIC問題の慣例に従った表現を使用

Return ONLY valid JSON without any markdown formatting or explanations.

Translate the following Part 4 questions and options to Japanese:

Question 1: What should customers do before the system maintenance begins?
Options:
A: Wait until Sunday to shop.
B: Ignore the announcement.
C: Contact the support team immediately.
D: Complete urgent transactions before midnight on Saturday.

Question 2: When will the system maintenance start?
Options:
A: Saturday at midnight.
B: Sunday at midnight.
C: Monday at midnight.
D: Sunday at noon.

Question 3: What should customers do if they need help?
Options:
A: Wait until the website is back online.
B: Contact the support team.
C: Visit the store in person.
D: Send an email to the manager.

Return the translations in this JSON format:
{
  "questionsTranslations": [
    {
      "questionTranslation": "問題1の日本語訳",
      "optionTranslations": ["選択肢Aの日本語訳", "選択肢Bの日本語訳", "選択肢Cの日本語訳", "選択肢Dの日本語訳"]
    },
    // 同様に3問分
  ]
}

Generate a TOEIC Part 4 speech with the following specifications:

【Speech Type】: Airport or flight announcement (空港・飛行機内の案内)
【Industry】: Sports and Fitness (スポーツ・フィットネス)
【Difficulty】: medium
【Question Types】: intended_audience, next_action, intended_audience
【Correct Answer Positions】: Question 1=D, Question 2=C, Question 3=B

Create a natural monologue speech appropriate for the specified speech type and industry context. The speech should be 30-60 seconds when read aloud (approximately 100-150 words).

For each question:
- Place the correct answer at the EXACT position specified above
- Ensure all other options are plausible but clearly incorrect
- Match the question type specified for each question

Return the response in the specified JSON format.

```json
{
  "speechContent": {
    "speaker": {
      "id": "A",
      "name": "Announcer",
      "role": "Airport Information Officer",
      "gender": "female"
    },
    "text": "Ladies and gentlemen, welcome to Fit Airways. For those traveling to the International Sports and Fitness Expo in Miami, please proceed to Gate 14. Our flight will begin boarding at 3:20 PM. We kindly ask all passengers to have their boarding passes and identification ready for inspection. Additionally, if you have any sports equipment that needs to be checked in, please visit the special counter located next to the gate. For your convenience, fitness magazines and healthy snacks are available for purchase at the kiosk. We thank you for choosing Fit Airways and hope you enjoy your flight.",
    "topic": "Announcement for passengers attending a sports and fitness expo"
  },
  "questions": [
    {
      "id": 1,
      "question": "Who is this announcement intended for?",
      "options": [
        "Passengers traveling to New York",
        "Business travelers",
        "Families with children",
        "Attendees of the Sports and Fitness Expo"
      ],
      "correct": "Attendees of the Sports and Fitness Expo",
      "correctPosition": "D",
      "explanation": "このアナウンスは、スポーツとフィットネスエキスポに参加する乗客を対象としています。",
      "questionType": "intended_audience"
    },
    {
      "id": 2,
      "question": "What should passengers do next if they have sports equipment?",
      "options": [
        "Board the plane immediately",
        "Wait at the main terminal",
        "Visit the special counter next to the gate",
        "Proceed to the baggage claim area"
      ],
      "correct": "Visit the special counter next to the gate",
      "correctPosition": "C",
      "explanation": "スポーツ用品を持っている乗客は、ゲートの隣にある特別カウンターに行くように指示されています。",
      "questionType": "next_action"
    },
    {
      "id": 3,
      "question": "Who is the intended audience for this announcement?",
      "options": [
        "Travelers with pets",
        "Passengers going to the Sports and Fitness Expo",
        "Business class passengers",
        "Frequent flyers"
      ],
      "correct": "Passengers going to the Sports and Fitness Expo",
      "correctPosition": "B",
      "explanation": "アナウンスはスポーツとフィットネスエキスポに行く乗客を対象にしています。",
      "questionType": "intended_audience"
    }
  ]
}
```

あなたは英日翻訳の専門家です。TOEIC Part 4のスピーチと関連情報を日本語に翻訳してください。

重要:
- 自然で分かりやすい日本語に翻訳
- ビジネス用語は適切な日本語表現を使用
- 文脈を考慮した翻訳

Return ONLY valid JSON without any markdown formatting or explanations.

Translate the following Part 4 speech content to Japanese:

Speech Type: flight_announcement
Industry: sports_fitness
Speaker Role: Airport Information Officer
Topic: Announcement for passengers attending a sports and fitness expo

Speech Text:
Ladies and gentlemen, welcome to Fit Airways. For those traveling to the International Sports and Fitness Expo in Miami, please proceed to Gate 14. Our flight will begin boarding at 3:20 PM. We kindly ask all passengers to have their boarding passes and identification ready for inspection. Additionally, if you have any sports equipment that needs to be checked in, please visit the special counter located next to the gate. For your convenience, fitness magazines and healthy snacks are available for purchase at the kiosk. We thank you for choosing Fit Airways and hope you enjoy your flight.

Return the translations in this JSON format:
{
  "speechTypeTranslation": "スピーチタイプの日本語訳",
  "textTranslation": "スピーチ全文の日本語訳",
  "topicTranslation": "トピックの日本語訳"
}

```json
{
  "speechTypeTranslation": "フライトアナウンス",
  "textTranslation": "皆さま、フィットエアウェイズへようこそ。マイアミで開催される国際スポーツ＆フィットネスエキスポにご参加の方は、ゲート14へお進みください。搭乗開始は午後3時20分です。すべての乗客の皆さまに、搭乗券と身分証明書のご用意をお願いいたします。また、スポーツ用品をお預けになる場合は、ゲート横にある特別カウンターをご利用ください。お客様の便宜のために、フィットネス雑誌や健康的なおやつをキオスクでお買い求めいただけます。フィットエアウェイズをご利用いただきありがとうございます。良いフライトをお楽しみください。",
  "topicTranslation": "スポーツ＆フィットネスエキスポに参加する乗客へのアナウンス"
}
```

あなたは英日翻訳の専門家です。TOEIC Part 4の問題と選択肢を日本語に翻訳してください。

重要:
